objectives.text: Speak with the calcified sign at the crossroads.
Find Eleazar Carbo in the wheat fields.
Check the Carbo house for Eleazar.
Return to Eleazar with what you found.

stages.description: A calcified man has been used as a living road sign at the Ash Road crossroads.
Gideon Carbo asked you to check on his brother Eleazar, who was taken to the farm fields.
Eleazar Carbo still cares for the descendants who kept him in the wheat. Find out what happened to the house.
The current Carbo family has been raised on crosses in the yard. Eleazar is waiting for your answer.
You answered Eleazar Carbo. Truth or mercy, the wheat has gone quiet again.
